blocker: HRV feature names exceed implemented RR statistics
decision: Describe the current checkpoint input as 5 RR statistics, 20 reserved zeros, 5 intended amplitude slots, and 6 global statistics; do not claim RMSSD/SDNN/LF-HF.
restriction: No full-HRV or invariant-anchor claim is allowed.

blocker: Amplitude slots were zeroed by the Chapman training feature pipeline
decision: Preserve zero amplitude slots for current-checkpoint OOF/external evaluation and retrain before claiming amplitude contribution.
restriction: Current checkpoints cannot support a causal amplitude-feature claim.

blocker: PTB superclass mapping differed between notebook and script
decision: Use official PTB-XL diagnostic superclass labels for every positive-likelihood diagnostic code; map Chapman outputs to the four declared proxy superclasses and report unsupported HYP/unmapped codes.
restriction: PTB outputs remain experimental because predictions are Chapman-class proxies and HYP is unsupported.

blocker: Mean and incorrect geometric-mean implementations conflicted with Power Mean Q=3
decision: Use power_mean_v2 generalized mean, cache schema v2, and rebuild record probabilities from saved slices or rerun inference.
restriction: Legacy record and fold caches without implementation/schema metadata are invalid.

blocker: Georgia archive was aliased as CPSC2021
decision: Treat Georgia and CPSC2021 as distinct datasets and distinct exporter choices.
restriction: Never label Georgia-derived results as CPSC2021.

decision: Notebook 04 must use the same preprocessing, slicing, threshold, and aggregation contract before baseline claims are released.
restriction: A0 completion records the deferral; baseline claims remain blocked until A3 completes.

blocker: Fold PCA provenance and external PCA mismatch
decision: OOF logs fold-aware PCA provenance. Build and checksum one PCA object per training fold with 08_build_fold_pca.py; external inference is blocked until all five objects exist.
restriction: External outputs stay experimental/not_manuscript_ready until fold PCA artifacts and the remaining external protocol gates are reviewed.

blocker: External dataset label and window protocols require dataset-specific validation
decision: PTB uses official diagnostic superclass labels and reports unsupported codes; Georgia skips records without mapped labels; CPSC uses annotation-aligned 10-second majority-rhythm windows and skips annotation failures.
restriction: All external outputs are isolated under reports/revision/experimental with manuscript_ready=false.

blocker: Training validation used EMA weights but historical best checkpoint files saved raw weights
decision: Raw checkpoint OOF and validation-selected best_ema OOF are diagnostic. Retrain five folds with explicit checkpoint metadata, then use fixed-epoch fold*_final_ema.pt for manuscript OOF. Keep fold*_best_ema.pt only for convergence diagnostics unless nested CV is added.
restriction: No historical raw checkpoint or validation-selected best_ema OOF metric may be used as the primary Chapman manuscript result.
